Combat sport events in 2026
ONE Fight Night 39: Rambolek vs. Dayakaev
PromotionONE Championship
DateJanuary 24, 2026 (2026-01-24)
VenueLumpinee Boxing Stadium
CityBangkok, Thailand
Attendance4,200
Event chronology
ONE Fight Night 38 ONE Fight Night 39: Rambolek vs. Dayakaev ONE Fight Night 40

ONE Fight Night 39: Rambolek vs. Dayakaev was a combat sports event produced by ONE Championship that took place on January 24, 2026, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand.

Background

[edit]

A bantamweight Muay Thai bout between Rambolek Chor.Ajalaboon and Abdulla Dayakaev headlined the event.[1]The bout originally scheduled met at ONE Fight Night 37 in November 2025, but the bout was canceled after Dayakaev has a hand infection.[2]

At the weigh-ins, one fighter failed to hydration test and missed weight for their respective fights:[3]

  • João Pedro Dantas weighed in at 160.8 pounds, 5.8 pounds over the featherweight limit and he was fined 30 percent of his purse which went to Mohammad Siasarani.

Results

[edit]
Fight card (Amazon Prime Video)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Bantamweight Muay Thai Rambolek Chor.Ajalaboon def. Abdulla Dayakaev KO (punch to the body) 2 2:41
Flyweight Muay Thai Asadula Imangazaliev def. Kongthoranee Sor.Sommai KO (punch to the body) 2 1:06
Welterweight Chase Mann def. Isi Fitikefu TKO (knee injury) 1 5:00
Women's Atomweight Chihiro Sawada def. Natalie Salcedo Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Featherweight Kickboxing Mohammad Siasarani def. João Pedro Dantas Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00 [a]
Women's Openweight Submission Grappling Helena Crevar def. Teshya Noelani Alo Submission (estima lock) 1 1:40 [b]
Strawweight Bokang Masunyane def. Ryohei Kurosawa Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Featherweight Muay Thai Vladimir Kuzmin def. Mohanad Battbootti Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Bantamweight Carlo Bumina-ang def. Marcos Aurélio TKO (punch) 2 0:50
  1. ^ Dantas missed weight (160.8 lb).
  2. ^ Originally Women's bantamweight, changed to Openweight.

[4]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses:

  • Performance of the Night: Rambolek Chor.Ajalaboon and Asadula Imangazaliev

  2. ^ "ONE Championship: Abdulla Dayakaev Diagnosed with Straph Infection in Hand, Rambolek Bout Postponed on Morning of ONE Fight Night 37". Bangkok Post. 8 November 2025. Retrieved 19 January 2026.
